_meta.purpose: Defector contact roster tied to Trust family exposed entries.
_meta.note: Each contact is a named NPC the captain can meet, with intel unlock, access requirement, reward, and internal-family politics. Tone: dry, operational.

schema.home_station: string — station id or named place
schema.captain_requirement: string — what the captain must do to unlock contact
schema.internal_politics: string — one sentence on family split that enables this contact

defector_contacts.status: Active. Sterling family has a bounty on his operating license.
defector_contacts.captain_requirement: High bond with B1 Dispatch Network, OR successful cover test against T2.
defector_contacts.reward: Corridor clearance codes that bypass Sterling insurance blocks.
defector_contacts.internal_politics: Split from Sterling after the insurance-block order; the Vossi branch quietly funds his courier ring because it keeps their parallel corridor viable.

defector_contacts.status: Active. Wanted by Cartwright-Hale and Sterling family.
defector_contacts.captain_requirement: Bring her a scanner part from a derelict, OR resolve a B2 internal dispute.
defector_contacts.reward: Salvage repair discount, Sterling insurance fraud evidence.
defector_contacts.internal_politics: Vossis disowned her for selling corridor secrets to competing captains; she runs Breach Yard's no-Trust salvage crew and is not sorry.

defector_contacts.status: Active. Lindqvist has a surveillance flag on her file.
defector_contacts.captain_requirement: Crew bond check + geophysical survey data from a derelict probe.
defector_contacts.internal_politics: Senior Adebayo engineers protected her when the suppression order came down; she is a scientist who will not let falsified data stand.

defector_contacts.status: Compromised. Hale family is forcing her to sign the buyout agreement under house arrest.
defector_contacts.captain_requirement: Break her surveillance flag — diplomacy with NAC garrison commander OR hack T1 clearance system.
defector_contacts.reward: Second vein coordinates, buyout contract copy.
defector_contacts.internal_politics: Hale family split over her discovery; the senior matriarch wants the buyout to consolidate power, younger operatives want to publish and break Cartwright dominance.

defector_contacts.status: Active. Meridian CEO Voss has marked him for reassignment to a remote outpost.
defector_contacts.captain_requirement: Bring proof of tampered curriculum from a genship schooling record.
defector_contacts.reward: Suppressed history packets, relay override codes.
defector_contacts.internal_politics: Reeves preserves history rather than manufactures myths; the suppressed-history archive is his insurance — if Voss fires him, he releases everything.

defector_contacts.status: Active but flagged. T4 compliance office has her under periodic review.
defector_contacts.captain_requirement: Deliver a patient-data wipe from a T4 outer clinic, OR successfully cover-test against T4 with high crew bond.
defector_contacts.reward: Full marker case-file archive, plus T4 whistleblower credentials that lower T4 suspicion in subsequent encounters.
defector_contacts.internal_politics: Raines clinicians are already leaking through an informal chain; she wants to go public while younger clinicians want to stay inside and steer the program from below.

defector_contacts.status: Compromised in theory, active in practice. Gray family publicly claimed she died in a shuttle accident three years ago.
defector_contacts.captain_requirement: Extract her during a scheduled T5 audit cycle, OR deliver a falsified Gray insurance document that clears her temporarily.
defector_contacts.reward: Death-certificate forgery templates, legal framework document proving Trust commercial law has no standing over defector crews.
defector_contacts.internal_politics: Gray archivists protect her because the ledgers implicate half the Gray adjudication wing; the Kessler branch wants her dead because the jurisdiction opinion threatens court revenue.

defector_contacts.status: Open secret. Forge and Frame terminated him after he refused to sign the fatigue-test cover-up; his clearance has not yet been revoked.
defector_contacts.captain_requirement: Smuggle him off-station before clearance revocation, OR deliver the Orison fatigue plates from mars_sites.json to him for forensic confirmation.
defector_contacts.reward: Hull-maintenance codes valid across T6-rated stations, refit-billing ledger that can trigger a fleet inspection.
defector_contacts.internal_politics: Old guard want to publish the fatigue data and break the billing cycle; new guard want to keep collecting refit fees because margins are too good. Rafal is trying to swing the old guard before his access is cut.

defector_contacts.status: Hidden. Chengs list her as deceased in an off-station transport accident; she actually runs a maintenance crew in the enrichment cascade.
defector_contacts.captain_requirement: Pass a T7 radiation-clearance check to access the cascade, OR bring proof of Okafor leakage to a Chengs family meeting to force a split.
defector_contacts.reward: Catalyst synthesis parameters (genship fuel yield +30%), Okafor leakage manifest exposing Trust-linked captains.
defector_contacts.internal_politics: Chengs are split between catalyst hoarders and Okafor distribution running side experiments. Keiko wants the catalyst public so nobody can leverage it again.
